nasb.text: And He put all things in subjection under His feet, and gave Him as head over all things to the church,

esv.text: And he put all things under his feet and gave him as head over all things to the church,

cnv.text: 神又使萬有都歸服在他的腳下，並且賜他給教會作萬有的元首。

ccb.text: 祂又使万物降服在基督脚下，使基督为教会做万物的元首。

csbs.text: 神又使万有都服从在基督的脚下，使基督为教会做了超越万有的元首。
